title: Email Notification Trigger: Only effecting 1 item instead of all items
excerpt:

posts.author: jgore (Josh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to create a notification email, (which will be triggered by a date), and is only triggered by one item, versus being triggered by any / all items?

Example: I have 40 task items in one board. 3 of those tasks require that the owner have a follow-up conversation with their team. I would like to create an email notification that is only triggered by these 3 items, whenever their start date occurs. Is this possible?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jgore! If you’d like to achieve this, I’d recommend setting up a specific status column as a means to identify the specific items you’d like to trigger the email notification.

i.e.

Screen Shot 2023-02-13 at 4.13.45 pm1248×654 33.6 KB

Let me know if this would help!
